examples.title: Algorithm: Connected Component
examples.description: Identify pixels above a specific threshold
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ConnectedComponent
INPUT: image, threshold
OUTPUT: mask

BEGIN
  INITIALIZE mask as zeros
  FOR EACH pixel in image
    IF pixel > threshold THEN
      SET corresponding pixel in mask to 1
  RETURN mask
END
